Get Quote

Mild steel sheet work

MS Sheet Cutting in Bangalore

S.B.G. Punching provides MS sheet cutting for fabrication shops, OEMs, panel builders and industrial customers. We support laser cutting, CNC punching and sheet bending for mild steel parts that need accurate dimensions and repeatable batch production.

📞 Call UsView Production Gallery
MSMild steel
CutLaser profiles
PunchHole patterns
BendProfiles

MS applications

Mild Steel Parts

MS sheet is widely used for brackets, panels, enclosures, guards, trays, frames and machine components.

Laser Cut Blanks

Profiles, plates, gussets, brackets, supports, machine parts and fabrication inputs.

Punched Panels

Slots, holes, louvers, perforations, ventilation panels and electrical enclosure cutouts.

Bent Parts

Channels, covers, boxes, trays and formed components ready for assembly.

Industries

Who We Support

Fabricators

Local job work for cutting, punching and bending before welding or assembly.

Panel Builders

MS and CRCA sheet parts for doors, covers, gland plates and mounting plates.

OEMs

Repeat production parts for machines, equipment, HVAC and industrial products.

Send MS drawing

Need MS sheet cutting pricing?

Share thickness, size, quantity and drawing for a quote.
